name: Mike Pence
role: Vice President of the United States
summary: Trump's Vice President who refused to overturn the 2020 election, ran against Trump in the 2024 Republican primaries, and said he would not endorse Trump.

keyStatements.quote: The American people deserve to know that President Trump asked me to put him over my oath to the Constitution. Anyone who puts himself over the Constitution should never be president of the United States.

I believe that anyone who puts themselves over the constitution should never be president of the United States. And anyone who asked someone else to put them over the constitution should never be president of the United States again.
I will not be endorsing Donald Trump this year.

timeline.significance: Ran in Republican primaries against former boss

timeline.event: Said he would not endorse Trump
timeline.significance: Formally refused to support Trump's candidacy

credibility.background: Former Vice President, Governor of Indiana, U.S. Representative
positions: Vice President of the United States (2017-2021)

oppositionReasons: Trump asked him to violate his constitutional oath on January 6
Trump abandoned oath to 'support and defend the Constitution'
endorsement: Ran against Trump in 2024 primaries, refused to endorse him

sources.title: Mike Pence Tears into Donald Trump at 2024 Campaign Launch
Pence says he won't endorse Trump in 2024 race
